auth_token.description: Zonka Feedback API token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <auth_token>). Takes precedence over access_token when both are set. Never logged.

access_token.description: Fallback Zonka Feedback API token, used only when auth_token is unset. Sent as a Bearer token. Never logged.

base_url.description: Zonka Feedback API base URL override for tests or proxies.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-200); sent as the 'per_page' query param.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
